introSection: The owner of Kid's World, located in Long Branch, New Jersey, USA, received a permit to operate this roller coaster a day before a fire destroyed it and the pier on June 6, 1987. The fire started at about 3pm on Monday and the park was closed at that time. It isn't believed that the roller coaster operated on the previous Sunday.
fullText: The owner of Kid's World, located in Long Branch, New Jersey, USA, received a permit to operate this roller coaster a day before a fire destroyed it and the pier on June 6, 1987. The fire started at about 3pm on Monday and the park was closed at that time. It isn't believed that the roller coaster operated on the previous Sunday.
